svg.title: Slate app page flow
svg.desc: Navigation flow showing sign-in, home with notes and folders, note editor, share, and settings screens

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What goes on the sign-in screen?')
sendPrompt('What goes on the home screen?')
sendPrompt('What goes on the note editor screen?')
sendPrompt('What is in the long-press note menu?')
sendPrompt('What goes on the folder view screen?')
sendPrompt('What goes on the share screen?')
sendPrompt('How does moving a note to a folder work?')
sendPrompt('What does the public note viewer look like?')
